name: starrocks-dev
description: Drive a remote StarRocks dev host over SSH. Seven skills: sr-connect (SSH/dev-env setup + verify), sr-build (compile FE/BE), sr-test (FE/BE/regression tests), sr-deploy (deploy + start/stop cluster, auto-ports), sr-diagnose (locate/reproduce a crash from a stack trace), sr-inspect (connect to a live cluster through the dev host and inspect perf/correctness), sr-rollout (full-replace a live cluster's binaries with a worktree profile's build, OS-matched, node by node).
